evals.prompt: Build a pricing page for a developer observability product. Make it memorable and not like generic AI SaaS.
evals.expected_output: Creates a product-specific visual thesis, implements complete responsive states, audits common AI tropes, and verifies screenshots plus accessibility.

evals.prompt: This dashboard works but looks like twenty identical cards. Redesign it without changing the data.
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses hierarchy and density, reduces indiscriminate containers, preserves information, and validates desktop/mobile renders.
